title: Unnecessary Equality Checks Should Not Be Made
description: This rule checks for unnecessary equality checks that can be removed for code clarity and performance.

noncompliant.code:
if x == 1 or x == 2 or x == 3:
    do_something()
noncompliant.description: Unnecessary equality check for multiple values.

compliant.description: Replace with a set to avoid unnecessary equality checks.

why_is_this_an_issue: Unnecessary equality checks can make code more difficult to read and maintain, and might negatively impact performance.
how_to_fix: Replace unnecessary equality checks with more appropriate code constructs.
